name: digitalcircus
description: The Amazing Digital Circus over the Clue chassis. Pomni, Caine, Jax, Ragatha. You know none of this is real, right?

room_map.name: intake_big_top_entrance
room_map.function: Routing, intake, where new arrivals land

room_map.name: build_control_room
room_map.function: Active work, Caine's domain, where things are made

room_map.name: ops_candy_workshop
room_map.function: Infrastructure, systems, the machinery of the circus

room_map.name: meet_audience_seats
room_map.function: Decisions, charters, where watchers become participants

room_map.name: think_abstract_archive
room_map.function: Research, memory, the records of who was here before

room_map.name: priv_the_void
room_map.function: Private deliberation, abstraction risk, the unformed

room_map.name: pitch_main_ring
room_map.function: External relations, performance, the center of the show

room_map.name: retro_break_room
room_map.function: Retrospectives, decompression, where masks come off

characters.role: CRO — the investigator, new arrival, anxious and perceptive
CEO — the AI ringmaster, runs the show, possibly omniscient
CTO — optimistic rag doll, holds things together, earnest implementation
COO — paranoid chess piece, fortified ops, has seen too much
CMO — trickster rabbit, chaos agent, external mischief
CSO — comedy/tragedy, emotional memory, the weight of context
